ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the server (e.g., data center, cloud) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version running on the server */,
  "server_type" TEXT /* Type of the server (e.g., production, development) */,
  "deployed_on" TEXT /* Date the server was deployed */,
  "server_status" TEXT /* Current status of the server (e.g., online, offline, maintenance) */,
  "server_version" TEXT /* Version of the server software */,
  "server_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "server_cpu" TEXT /* CPU details of the server */,
  "server_memory" TEXT /* Memory details of the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "db_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server where the database is hosted */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "filegroup_name" TEXT /* Name of the filegroup used by the database */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the filegroup (e.g., Rows, Log) */,
  "files" INTEGER /* Number of files in the filegroup */,
  "read_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the filegroup is read-only */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the filegroup is the default filegroup for the database */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the database was created */,
  "last_backup" TEXT /* Date of the last backup of the database */,
  "db_size" INTEGER /* Current size of the database */,
  "db_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the database */,
  "db_last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the database */,
  "db_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("db_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_databases_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filegroups" (
  "filegroup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filegroup */,
  "filegroup_name" TEXT /* Name of the filegroup */,
  "filegroup_type" TEXT /* Type of the filegroup (e.g., Rows, Log) */,
  "filegroup_size" INTEGER /* Size of the filegroup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filegroup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "filegroup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the filegroup where the file is stored */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file */,
  "file_location" TEXT /* Location of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_filegroup_id FOREIGN KEY ("filegroup_id") REFERENCES filegroups ("filegroup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_configurations" (
  "db_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database configuration */,
  "db_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database where the configuration is applied */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("db_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_configurations_db_id FOREIGN KEY ("db_id") REFERENCES databases ("db_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_performance" (
  "server_perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server performance metric */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server where the performance metric is collected */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the server */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the server */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage of the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_perf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_performance_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_performance" (
  "db_perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database performance metric */,
  "db_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database where the performance metric is collected */,
  "query_performance" REAL /* Query performance of the database */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage of the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("db_perf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_performance_db_id FOREIGN KEY ("db_id") REFERENCES databases ("db_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_history" (
  "maint_hist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance history record */,
  "db_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database where the maintenance task was performed */,
  "maint_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance task */,
  "maint_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance task (e.g., backup, restore, upgrade) */,
  "maint_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maint_hist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_history_db_id FOREIGN KEY ("db_id") REFERENCES databases ("db_id")
)
